questions.text: What is the primary objective of prompt-based role segregation in multi-agent systems?
options: To define clear behavioral boundaries and prevent confirmation bias during complex tasks.
To speed up token generation rates.
questions.correct_answer: To define clear behavioral boundaries and prevent confirmation bias during complex tasks.
questions.explanation: Segregating roles ensures agents focus on their specific tasks (e.g. coding vs testing), mitigating bias and improving quality.
